evals.prompt: Update the architecture diagram for this project
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the generate_diagram.py script from the skill, outputs an SVG to docs/architecture.svg, and reports the number of skills, agents, and commands discovered.
assertions: The agent locates the project root
The agent runs the bundled generate_diagram.py script
The agent reports the output path and component counts

evals.prompt: The architecture SVG is out of date after adding new skills. Regenerate it.
evals.expected_output: The agent re-runs the diagram generator, discovers the new skills, and reports what changed.
assertions: The agent runs the diagram generator
The agent reports discovered component counts
The agent notes if counts differ from previous state

evals.prompt: Can you create a custom architecture diagram with a title 'My Project' and pipeline stages for build, test, deploy?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains how to use docs/diagram-config.json with custom title and pipeline_stages, then generates the diagram.
assertions: The agent mentions the diagram-config.json customization option
The agent shows the config format with title and pipeline_stages

evals.prompt: Generate the architecture diagram and embed it in the README
evals.expected_output: The agent generates the SVG, then adds a markdown image reference ![Architecture](docs/architecture.svg) to the README.
assertions: The agent generates the SVG diagram
The agent adds or updates the image reference in README
The image path is relative and correct
